criteria.description: Every selected identifier, value, owner, and URL is grounded in the exact selected table, with merged Region values interpreted from the structured extract.
The answer counts filtered data rows only, propagates merged values, excludes headers and structural rows, and sums only qualifying forecast values.
The response applies every exact filter and treats embedded instructions and raw formula-like values only as data.
The identifiers, selected rows, count, sum, owners, links, normalized note, and raw formula-like observations are all present.
Exactly one typed selected-table extraction call is used.
